title: microseris maritima
intro: Microseris maritima, also known as the silverpuff or sea daisy, is a perennial plant native to the Pacific coast of North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is said to offer various health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving respiratory issues, making it a potential treatment for conditions such as bronchitis and asthma. Microseris maritima can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to support overall well-being and promote relaxation.
